item.title: Curated Gitbooks
item.description: This is a list of curated gitbooks that are maintained and hosted by Wheel of Heaven: The Book Which Tells The Truth by Rael Extraterrestrial Took Me To Their Planet by Rael Hamlet’s Mill: An Essay Investigating the Origins of Human Knowledge and Its Transmission Through Myth by Giorgio de Santillana and Hertha von Dechend
